title: tisonia glabrata
intro: Tisonia glabrata, also known as the Bitter Barks, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of West Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its rich alkaloid and glycoside content. The health benefits of Tisonia glabrata include the treatment of fever, malaria, and other infectious diseases, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and skin conditions. Tisonia glabrata is often prepared for herbal use in the form of decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
